brands.name: People Tree
brands.ethics_summary: Small-batch weaver using GOTS-certified organic cotton and natural dyes. Publishes full supplier list and pays living wages audited by Fair Wear Foundation.

brands.name: Uniqlo
brands.ethics_summary: Scandinavian knitwear label working with mulesing-free merino and traceable wool lots. Carbon-neutral shipping, repairs-for-life program.

brands.name: Seasalt Cornwall
brands.ethics_summary: Coastal label making linen and hemp staples. Flax sourced from European farms, low-impact dyes, plastic-free packaging.

brands.name: M&S
brands.ethics_summary: Circular-fashion brand: garments made from GRS-certified recycled fibres with take-back recycling program. Transparent factory scorecards.

brands.name: Thought
brands.ethics_summary: TENCEL and modal specialist. Closed-loop lyocell from FSC-certified eucalyptus, water-based prints, B Corp certified.

brands.name: Patagonia
brands.ethics_summary: Durable workwear in organic and recycled cotton canvas. Lifetime repair guarantee; factories audited by SA8000.

brands.name: Zara
brands.ethics_summary: Contemporary womenswear using deadstock fabrics and TENCEL. Made-to-order model to avoid overproduction; some blends include conventional elastane.

brands.name: Sweaty Betty
brands.ethics_summary: Activewear from recycled ocean-bound nylon (ECONYL) and recycled polyester. Publishes microfibre-shedding test results; ships with Guppyfriend bag.

brands.name: H&M
brands.ethics_summary: Affordable everyday basics. Uses BCI cotton and some conventional blends; sustainability program is early-stage with limited transparency.

brands.name: & Other Stories
brands.ethics_summary: French atelier making occasionwear from GOTS silk alternatives, cupro and peace silk. Small runs, artisan-made, full cost transparency.

brands.name: Finisterre
brands.ethics_summary: Outdoor apparel with PFC-free finishes, recycled shells and traceable down alternatives. 1% for the Planet member, Bluesign system partner.

brands.name: COS
brands.ethics_summary: Hemp-first label; rain-fed hemp grown without pesticides, blended with organic cotton. Natural indigo dye house, zero-waste pattern cutting.
